creator: trust_no_1@libero.it
text:
Hi Guido, sorry for the delay, I was out of town.
Anyway, I can confirm that after recompiling qt5-core, qt5-gui and qt5-widgets, calibre successfully builds on 10.2
Just for clarity: I have to rebuild some other port as well (python27 and py27-sip), but now I have calibre 2.50.1 "up and running"!.
Thanks a lot!

Mauro.
